meta.title: the roster
meta.blurb: shadowform supports a small collective of electronic artists across subgenres — from ambient and techno to experimental club music. we believe in artist-first management and long-term vision.

artists.name: artist one
artists.bio: crafting dense, emotional club music since 2021. debut EP out on Subtext Collective. featured on Spotify's Electronic Rising playlist.

artists.name: artist two
artists.bio: textural soundscapes and slow-moving frequency work. latest release on IIKKI. ongoing collaboration with visual artists.
